I’m turning over a new leaf. 三、綜合測驗 說明:下面三篇短文,共有 15 格空格,為第 26 ∼ 40 題,每題有四個選項,請依各篇短文文意, 選出一個最適合該空格的答案。 ▲ 下篇短文共有 5 個空格,為第 26 ~ 30 題,請依短文文意,選出一個最適合該空格的答案。 Contrary to what you might think, Jeremy Lin is no overnight sensation. 26, he achieved success the old-fashioned way: he earned it. He worked hard and stayed humble. Jeremy made more efforts than any other players. 27, he showed up to every practice and game. He trained to complete exhaustion. He would shoot from a certain distance to the basket, and demanded that he score 10 times straight before moving to 28 spot. Moreover, he ate exactly as required by the nutritionist. 29 does Jeremy Lin read the Bible and pray, he is also a very humble person. When asked about his victories, he didn’t take all of the credit like many people do nowadays. 30, Jeremy acknowledged all of his other teammates. Jeremy’s story tells us that if you have discipline and integrity, you can get an opportunity to overcome the odds.

The natural 31 from child to adult can also bring parental conflict as teens start to gain more independence. With all this drama, it isn’t always easy to differentiate 32 depression and normal teenage moodiness. Teenage depression can develop into a serious problem that impacts every aspect of a teen’s life. It can 33 problems at home and school, drug abuse, violence or even suicide. To make things even more complicated, teens with depression do not 34 appear sad, nor do they always withdraw from others. For some depressed teens, symptoms of annoyance, aggression, and rage are more obvious. If you 35 that a teenager in your life is suffering from depression, speak up right away. Whether or not that problem turns out to be depression, it still needs to be addressed.

options: even busier 四、閱讀測驗 說明:以下三篇短文,共有 10 個題目,為第 41 ∼ 50 題,請閱讀短文後,選出最適當的答案。 ▲ 閱讀下文,回答第 41 ~ 43 題。 Most human beings are awake during the day and sleep all night. Owls live the opposite way. Owls are nocturnal. This means that they sleep all day and stay awake at night. Because owls are nocturnal, they must eat at night. But finding food in the dark is difficult. To better adapt to the environment, they have special eyes and ears. Owls have very large eyes, which absorb more light than other bird species. Since there is little light during the night, it is helpful to be able to absorb more of it. This helps owls find food in the dark. Owls also have very good hearing. Even when owls are in the trees, they can hear small animals moving in the grass below. This helps owls catch their preys even when it is very dark. 41. According to the passage, owls can find food in the dark using their. (A) sight only (B) hearing only (C) sight and hearing only (D) sight, hearing, and sense of smell

questions.subject: 英文
questions.q: According to the passage, owls can find food in the dark using their.
options: sight, hearing, and sense of smell

questions.q: What does the underlined word “ preys ” mean?
options: A noise that an animal makes during the night.
An animal that is hunted by other animals.
An animal that hunts other animals.

questions.q: We can infer that an animal which is “ nocturnal ”.
options: hunts during the day and is awake at night
sleeps at night and is awake during the day
is active during the day and inactive at night

sleeps during the day and is awake at night ▲ 閱讀下文,回答第 44 ~ 47 題。 th Saint Patrick’s Day, which falls on March 17, is a big day in Ireland and in North America. Saint Patrick was born in Roman Britain about 385. He was kidnapped and brought to Ireland as a slave at the age of 16. He later escaped to Ireland, where he travelled all over, teaching and talking to people about th Christianity. He built many schools and churches there. He died on March 17, 461. The Irish have observed this day as a religious holiday for over 1,000 years. On Saint Patrick’s Day, there are parades, th church services and festivals in Dublin, Belfast. It is also an important day in the USA. In the 19 century, a lot of Irish people travelled to the USA to begin a new life. Saint Patrick Day was a day for them to remember Ireland. The Saint Patrick’s Day Parade in New York is one of the biggest parades in the world. There are parties around the USA and Canada, too. People wear green clothes and drink lots of beer. Some even drink green beer!

is a sad day to memorize Saint Patrick’s death
